content.en:
Black Wolf City.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, the two siblings, can now be described as geniuses in Black Wolf City, although in the eyes of others, their background is average, and their parents are just ordinary people, but their cultivation talent is very good, and they have been promoted to the transcendent realm in just eighteen years (the human race has modified the cultivation realm, and the transcendent is similar to the previous god level).

The superlative powerhouse is also one of the masters in Black Wolf City, and the two brothers and sisters are usually helpful and specialize in teaching the wicked, so they also have a good reputation.

this day.

Thirty thousand miles away from Black Wolf City, Sunset Village.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, two siblings, tracked down a human trafficking organization and came here.

Sunset Village has a good name, but the two siblings discover that this village is a stronghold of evil forces, and they specialize in arresting young and beautiful women, and their behavior is very bad.

"Brother, I'll kill those people later!"

Ye Xingyue held the sword and said coldly.

"Okay, good!" Ye Xingchen nodded, although he also wanted to kill those beasts, but it was not good to grab people's heads with his own sister.

Soon, the two came to Sunset Village and saw a bunch of people patrolling.

The strength of these patrol martial artists is all sixth- and seventh-order strength, and judging from the investigation situation, the strongest person in this Sunset Village stronghold is also the ninth order, and there is no transcendental-level powerhouse.

Moreover, the divine senses of the two also probed the hundreds of women imprisoned in Sunset Village.

These women are in poor condition and desperate.

Seeing this scene, Ye Xingyue couldn't help it and killed him directly.

Wow!

Bursts of sword light tore through the air and descended, killing one patrol warrior after another.

"Enemy attack!"

The martial artists of the entire Sunset Village were all alarmed, and even the ninth-order martial artist rushed out.

In the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, now that he has not reached the transcendent level, he can't even fly, so that ninth-order martial artist can't fly.

"Kill her!"

A large number of martial artists rushed forward, but in front of the transcendental-level powerhouses, these people were like ants, and they were no opponents at all.

Seeing this, the ninth-order martial artist knew that the person who came was an extraordinary-level powerhouse, and he was immediately terrified, but he forcibly calmed down and threatened: "You two are just extraordinary-level, and you dare to enter our Sunset Village, do you know who is behind our Sunset Village?"

Ye Xingyue stopped, she was not afraid, but wanted to know who was behind the other party, so as to kill the people behind the scenes.

"Oh, who's behind you?"

Ye Xingyue asked curiously.

The ninth-order martial artist saw that the threat had an effect, so he said, "Behind us is the Zhao family of the Silver Blue Country!"

Originally, it was not allowed to divulge the forces behind it, but now that his life is threatened, how can he take care of this.

Moreover, in the Silver Blue Country region, their Zhao family is the sky.

"The Zhao family of the Silver Blue Country!"

Ye Xingyue frowned slightly.

This is not a small force, but a giant force, it is said that even the Silver Blue Country is supported by the Zhao family, and the Zhao family is not only the Zhao family of the Silver Blue Country, but across many countries.

It is even rumored that there is a big force behind the Zhao family, and this big force is one of the top overlords of the vast continent.

Of course.

That top overlord would not stand out easily for the Zhao family, but even the Zhao family could send a transcendent level at will.

The transcendent level is also divided into nine orders, above the transcendent ninth order is the god level (comparable to the cosmic god), and above the god level is the god general-level powerhouse!

The transcendental level is not a master in the vast continent, and the Zhao family not only has a large number of transcendental level, but also many, many god-level masters, and it is said that the Taishang Elder of the Zhao family is a god general.

"Even so, you have to die!"

Ye Xingyue shot out angrily and directly killed this ninth-order martial artist in one move.

This ninth-order martial artist never expected that after moving out of the Zhao family, Ye Xingyue would dare to fight back, this courage is too big!

Once exposed, Ye Xingyue will not be able to escape at all, and there will be no way for her to survive in the sky or on the ground.

After killing this ninth-order martial artist, Ye Xingyue quickly killed the other martial artists in Sunset Village one by one, releasing the group of women who had been captured.

After doing all this, Ye Xingyue said worriedly: "Brother, I got into trouble, I killed the people of the Zhao family, I'm afraid the Zhao family won't let us go!"

Ye Xingchen comforted: "Sister, you didn't do anything wrong, if you don't do it, brother, I will do it too." Now I'm just afraid that the Zhao family will find out, so we try our best to cover up the traces, hoping that the Zhao family won't find out about us!"

"Hmm!"

Ye Xingyue nodded slightly.

The two siblings destroyed the sunset village, ruined the breath, and quickly left.

Soon after.

A golden light swept through the sky and descended on the ruins of Sunset Village, judging from the breath, this was an extraordinary-level powerhouse, and it was also an extraordinary-level Zhao family.

"Sunset Village destroyed?"

Zhao Jiazhao said coldly.

Immediately, he began to investigate, and although he found no trace of the enemy, he captured several women who had escaped, and after interrogation, it was determined that they were two transcendentals, a man and a woman, both of whom were very young.

After determining the appearance of the men and women, Zhao You began to use the Zhao family's power in this area of Black Wolf City to investigate the identities of these two transcendentals.

Soon, the Zhao family determined the identity of the attacker, who was a genius boy and girl from Black Wolf City, and also twin brothers and sisters - Ye Xingyue and Ye Xingchen.

The Zhao family was very cautious, and did not do it immediately, but investigated their background, and determined that they did not have a big background, and their parents were also ordinary people, but they had good talent and fast cultivation speed, so they could step into the transcendent level.

Here in the Zhao family branch of the Silver Blue Country, the head of the family branch, Zhao Ba, who was already a god-level cultivator, immediately ordered a transcendent ninth-order to lead dozens of transcendent-level people to Black Wolf City.

Such a force was enough to easily destroy Black Wolf City, let alone capture only two little transcendent first-order geniuses.

---------------

Black Wolf City.

After Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, the two siblings came back, they were always worried, so they didn't go out again.

They are not afraid of their own safety, but they are afraid that it will affect their parents.

"Do you want to run away, run away with your parents, and let's go to other countries?" Ye Xingyue proposed.

"But father and mother, are they willing?" Ye Xingchen frowned and said: "They have lived here for more than ten years, and their friends and business are here, let them follow us, they will definitely not do it!"

"But in case the Zhao family ......"

Ye Xingyue was still extremely worried.

However, at this moment, a transcendent ninth-order aura permeated the entire Black Wolf City.

Bang!!!!

The battleship of the Zhao family descended, a transcendent ninth-order, dozens of transcendental-level, all of them in the void, overlooking the entire Black Wolf City.

At this time, the Transcendent Sixth-Order Black Wolf City Lord was so frightened that he hurriedly came out.

"I've seen all the adults of the Zhao family!"

The Black Wolf City Lord said respectfully.

"We only arrested two people, and before we were arrested, Black Wolf City was not allowed to enter or leave!" ordered Zhao Ziling, a transcendent ninth-order powerhouse.

"Yes!"

The Black Wolf City Lord replied.

"Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, you dare to kill the people of our Zhao family, get out of this seat!"

Zhao Ziling roared angrily.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, who were at home, changed their expressions greatly, they didn't expect that they would be exposed so quickly, and they completely underestimated the Zhao family's ability.

I saw that the Zhao family's transcendental-level divine senses continued to explore Black Wolf City, and soon, they found Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue.

Whoa!!!

Dozens of transcendent-level killers came, and Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were not afraid of affecting the others around them, so they took the initiative to fly out.

"Sure enough, genius, without much resources, you have reached the transcendent level at the age of eighteen, if you were born in some big forces and cultivated since childhood, I am afraid that you all have the hope of becoming a god-level powerhouse now! It's a pity that if you offend our Zhao family, you must die!" Zhao Ziling said coldly.

"Hmph, your Zhao family is damned for arresting young women for trafficking!"

Ye Xingyue scolded.

"Is there any evidence?" Zhao Ziling sneered, "Besides, who do you think believes your words?"

Ye Xingyue looked at the Black Wolf City Lord, but the Black Wolf City Lord didn't look at Ye Xingyue at all, and the other transcendent levels of the City Lord didn't dare to show up at all.

"Do you understand? Strength is everything, if you don't have the strength, you dare to provoke our Zhao family, death is your only end!" Zhao Ziling said.

Immediately, he made a move, and pressed away with one hand, as if the Buddha Lord suppressed Sun Monkey with ease.

The gap between the Transcendent First Order and the Transcendent Ninth Order was too great, and the difference in strength between the two sides was as big as a galaxy.

In the novel, the protagonist's enemies are always only a little taller than himself, and the situation of dying one by one does not exist in reality.

As soon as the Zhao family made a move, they were transcendent ninth-order, and they would not give them any chance to survive at all.

I saw Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue shoot with all their might, and then as soon as they touched Zhao Ziling's earth-shattering giant palm, it was like tofu touching a stone, and it shattered as soon as they touched it.

If they can't stop this palm, they will definitely die.

In the Black Wolf City, many transcendental levels sighed one after another, if these two brothers and sisters were given time, what was Zhao Ziling?

It's a pity that their cultivation time is too short.

At this moment, Zhao Ziling's earth-shattering giant palm suddenly collapsed on its own.

"Who?"

Zhao Ziling was terrified, his martial arts were silently erased by others, what kind of ability is this?

God-level?

Or is it the legendary god-level powerhouse?
